metrics.command_line: ln -s '/galaxy/server/database/objects/5/c/5/dataset_5c5d51fe-def0-43d1-9606-d33e0aa34116.dat' reference.fa && lofreq faidx reference.fa 2>&1 || echo "Error running samtools faidx for indexing fasta reference for lofreq" >&2 &&  ln -s '/galaxy/server/database/objects/3/a/6/dataset_3a6ac320-4f83-4ae7-b14e-ca8cc5730bf0.dat' reads.bam && ln -s -f '/galaxy/server/database/objects/_metadata_files/0/3/1/metadata_031be37b-43e3-471f-b3f3-b8031282a8e3.dat' reads.bam.bai &&   lofreq call-parallel --pp-threads ${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --verbose  --ref 'reference.fa' --out variants.vcf --call-indels   --min-cov 5 --max-depth 1000000  --min-bq 30 --min-alt-bq 30    --min-mq 0 --max-mq 255 --min-jq 0 --min-alt-jq 0 --def-alt-jq 0  --sig 0.0005 --bonf dynamic --no-default-filter  reads.bam 2>&1  || (tool_exit_code=$? && cat "$TMPDIR/lofreq2_call_parallel*/*.log" 1>&2 && exit $tool_exit_code)
